name: Asparagus Ham Rolls
recipeIngredient: 8 thin slices fully cooked ham (about 1/2 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Stir in the flour and cook until thickened.
3. Gradually stir in the milk, stirring constantly until bubbly and thickened.
4. Add the cheese, salt, and white pepper; mix well.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
6. Place three asparagus stalks on each ham slice.
7. Roll up each ham slice tightly with the asparagus.
8. Secure with toothpicks if needed.
9. Arrange in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan, covering with the cheese sauce.
10. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the rolls.
11. Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 minutes.
